since_last: 69% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.57%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.57% · BTC -0.90% · Gold -1.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.96%. 69% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.57%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.57%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -47.84%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +9.53%, PANW +7.77%, KLAC +7.11%, LRCX +6.48%, CRWD +6.38%. Laggards: HON -47.84%, MU -5.34%, SOUN -3.35%, INTC -2.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.08% at $154.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
